end of world model.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if there are any remaining R blocks that need to be activated
seg = current_frame.segmentation
r_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'R']
g_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
print("R blocks:", [(n['id'], n['pixels'], n['boundary'][:4]) for n in r_blocks])
print("G blocks:", [(n['id'], n['pixels'], n['boundary'][:4]) for n in g_blocks])

# Check green structure details
n_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print("N blocks:", [(n['id'], n['pixels']) for n in n_blocks])

# Try rotating to face RIGHT and see what happens
result = action(['SPACE'])
print("\nAfter SPACE:", result)

seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg2['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}] cols=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
